title: [RSO_Call for Proposals_April 11, 2025] National Health Commission (NHC) – Research | Duke Kunshan University
text:
[RSO_Call for Proposals_April 11, 2025] National Health Commission (NHC)
National Health Commission (NHC) is calling for proposals for the National Key Research and Development Project (国家重点研发计划).
You could visit the official website for more information: 国家科技管理信息系统公共服务平台. Due to the Ministry of Science and Technology’s confidential requirement, please log in to your personal MOST account to see the relevant project application guidelines. If you do not have an account yet, please contact the RSO, and we can help you create one.
Budget Total: each project has its specific funding plans, please log into your account to see detailed project descriptions.
Priority Areas:
Research on the Prevention and Treatment of Common Diseases常见多发病防治研究
Reproductive Health and Protection of Women and Children’s Health生育健康及妇女儿童健康保障
Stem Cell Research and Organ Repair干细胞研究与器官修复
Cutting-Edge Biotechnology前沿生物技术
Key Technologies for Biosafety Research生物安全关键技术研究
Project Period: each project has its own requirements, please log into your personal account to see specific project descriptions.
Eligibility:
PI must have the title of professor/associate professor/principal researcher scientist or a doctoral degree (高级职称或博士学位).
PI should be born after January 1st, 1965 (under 60 years old). The annual working time dedicated to the project should be no less than 6 months.
PI for the Young Scientist Project should be born after January 1st, 1985 (under 40 years old). The participants for the Young Scientist Project should also be under 40 years old.
PI shall be the proposer of the main research concept and the scientific personnel who leads the research projects.
Experts involved in drafting the implementation plan of key projects or this year’s project guidelines are not allowed to apply for this project.
Because the project may involve human genetic materials, pathogenic microorganisms, human bodies, and experimental animals, it is necessary to comply with relevant national ethical and biosafety management regulations. Please refer to the guidelines for details.
The proposal needs to be nominated by Jiangsu Department of Science and Technology.
For specific application requirements, please refer to each application guidelines. In case with special provisions, those provisions shall apply.
Language: Chinese
Internal Deadline: 12:00 pm, Wednesday, May 14th. The online submission will start from April 21st.
If you are interested in applying for this funding opportunity, please submit your proposals via MOST system by the internal deadline. Shall you encounter any difficulties or have any questions regarding the application process (including the requirements, completing forms, or clarifying any details), please feel free to reach out to Research Support Office Duke Kunshan research-support@dukekunshan.edu.cn.
